_comment: Pitfall registry — machine-readable metadata for docs/pitfalls.md. The NUMBER is a frozen legacy alias (never renumber, never reuse; #8 is retired). The SLUG is the stable identity for new citations. status: active = still binds design/behavior today; historical = fixed/superseded, lesson recorded; revision-queued = partially refuted, revision adjudicated but not landed; refuted = overturned by measurement. guard = the mechanical enforcement (lint rule / CI teeth), null when none. Held consistent with pitfalls.md and the CLAUDE.md index table by lint:doc-refs.

pitfalls.title: Empty RCON Response
pitfalls.rule: Empty rc11 reply (or 'not recognized' in agent shells) = instance down or mod unloaded; check cluster status + logs, use tools/rcon.ps1

pitfalls.title: Import Fails Silently
pitfalls.rule: Large imports must go through a chunking path (web UI Import JSON or /plugin-import-file) — a single RCON command silently truncates

pitfalls.title: Version Mismatch After Deploy
pitfalls.rule: Old code after deploy = deploy-cluster.ps1 didn't finish or containers didn't restart

pitfalls.title: Lua storage vs global
pitfalls.rule: Factorio 2.0 renamed global to storage; never write global.*

pitfalls.title: Finding Platform Index
pitfalls.rule: Platform indices are per-force and 1-based; find them with /list-platforms

pitfalls.title: Read-Only Entity Properties
pitfalls.rule: Factorio 2.0 made many entity properties read-only; set them at create_entity time, pcall optional ones

pitfalls.title: Unknown Items During Import
pitfalls.rule: Mod-mismatch imports skip unknown items with logged warnings, never crash

pitfalls.title: Duplicate Instances on Restart
pitfalls.rule: Fixed in base image: seeding is idempotent, docker compose restart is safe; down -v only for a full wipe

pitfalls.title: Instances Missing Space Age Mods
pitfalls.rule: Set DEFAULT_MOD_PACK=Space Age 2.0 in .env; mod pack binds on first seed only (needs down -v to change)

pitfalls.title: Both Instances Have Same Game Port
pitfalls.rule: Fixed in base image: host N auto-derives ports 34N00-34N99; compose mappings must match

pitfalls.title: Clusterio API Require Path
pitfalls.rule: require("modules/clusterio/api") — never __clusterio_lib__ (not a mod; save-patched under modules/)

pitfalls.title: Debug Mode Lost After Save Reset
pitfalls.rule: debug_mode lives in the save; on_init defaults it true for FRESH saves only — patch-and-reset or configure() to re-enable

pitfalls.title: Instance 2 Platform Not Built
pitfalls.rule: Host-2's seed save has a platform stub with no physical hub — it is the import target, not an export source

pitfalls.title: Entity Activation Before Validation
pitfalls.rule: The gate counts BEFORE any elapsed tick after activation — active machines craft in the gap and fake GAINS; activation only after the verdict

pitfalls.title: Verification Counts From Live Scan
pitfalls.rule: Belts keep moving (active-writes rejected): belt items must be extracted in ONE atomic tick, verification built from that consistent serialized data

pitfalls.title: Historical Pre-Activation Fluid Loss
pitfalls.rule: An old pipeline lost ~15% fluids pre-activation (class never isolated); fluid-lab R11 measured the CURRENT path exact in the frozen world — do not cite this as proof restoration needs a live world

pitfalls.title: Entity Handlers Must Export Fluids
pitfalls.rule: A specific entity handler must export fluids too if the type has a fluidbox (the default handler does; a partial handler silently drops fluid)

pitfalls.title: platform.destroy is a no-op
pitfalls.rule: Remove platforms via GameUtils.delete_platform (game.delete_surface) — argless platform.destroy() silently no-ops at 2.0.77

pitfalls.title: Failed Entity Loss Attribution
pitfalls.rule: When create_entity fails, tally the entity's items/fluids into failed_entity_losses and subtract from expected — otherwise validation blames a phantom loss

pitfalls.title: Fusion Plasma Handling
pitfalls.rule: Plasma is excluded from transfer by prototype connection-category; the write-rejection law did NOT reproduce at 2.0.77 (fluid-lab R14) — revision is the queued shared-accessor /di-change

pitfalls.title: Activatable Entities Expose No Own Segment ID
pitfalls.rule: Most activatables return nil from get_fluid_segment_id — read fluidbox[i] directly or fluids silently drop; EXCEPTION: fusion reactor's own boxes DO expose segment IDs

pitfalls.title: Temperature Merge and Key Boundaries
pitfalls.rule: Segment merges are volume-weighted and exact (R12); prototype max-temp clamps writes — the 10,000 threshold in reconcile_fluids is unlicensed by measurement

pitfalls.title: LuaProfiler Serialization
pitfalls.rule: LuaProfiler cannot serialize; persist timing by embedding profilers in LocalisedStrings at job completion, keep live profilers OUT of storage, display-only

pitfalls.title: LocalisedString 20-Parameter Limit
pitfalls.rule: One LocalisedString over 20 parameters hard-crashes the instance — split multi-value prints into one line per call

pitfalls.title: Call Clusterio Link Methods Bound
pitfalls.rule: Never extract/cast a Link method (handle, sendTo, ...) to a value — this loses, crashes at runtime; cast the arguments, never the method

pitfalls.title: Web-UI Icons Blank
pitfalls.rule: Blank ? icons = mod pack has no export-data; needs the graphical client on host-1 (never SKIP_CLIENT there), FACTORIO_CLIENT_TAG in lockstep with the instance version, regenerate via clusterioctl instance export-data

pitfalls.title: Gate Must Count a Complete State
pitfalls.rule: The pre-activation gate must measure a COMPLETE frozen world — held items seated by the single pre-gate owner pass; fix the timing, never the number

pitfalls.title: Dest Force Research Governs Held Capacity
pitfalls.rule: Inserter hand capacity = the DESTINATION force's research bonuses; Phase-0 raise-only force sync replicates source bonuses before any entity is created

pitfalls.title: Mutating Test Hooks Fail-Safe on Leak
pitfalls.rule: A state-mutating test_force_* hook must be pre-gate, disarmed in finally/trap, or non-destructive — a leaked post-gate hook is silent data loss on the NEXT transfer

pitfalls.title: Platform Identity Is surface.index, Never Name
pitfalls.rule: platform.name is mutable and collidable — every lock/delete/transfer identity decision keys on surface.index or the unique per-force index; name resolves only at the tooling boundary, loud on ambiguity

pitfalls.title: Export-Only Destination Must Be nil
pitfalls.rule: Number(null)===0 and 0 is Lua-truthy: only a positive integer targetInstanceId is a transfer destination; anything else passes Lua nil or the source stays locked
